compressed_prompt: Convert the sentence into an email format, ensuring it includes at least 10 placeholders like [name]. Use square brackets: The boots are warm but a little uncomfortable.
response:
Subject: Feedback on [Product Name] Boots

Hi [Customer Service Representative's Name],

I hope this email finds you well. I recently purchased the [Product Name] boots from your [Store Name] located at [Store Address]. 

I wanted to share some feedback regarding my experience with the boots. Firstly, I must say that the boots are indeed very warm, which is great for the [weather condition] we've been having lately. However, I have noticed that they are a little uncomfortable, particularly around the [specific area]. 

I would appreciate it if you could provide some advice on how to break them in or if there are any additional [accessories/insoles] that could help improve the comfort.
